auth.title: TRUEGRYND
auth.subtitle: No passwords. Just proof.
auth.magicLinkSentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}.

errors.magicLinkFailed: Failed to send magic link. Try again.
errors.magicLinkRateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes, then try again.
errors.profileLoadFailed: Signed in, but we could not load your profile.

onboarding.title: ONBOARDING

identity.heading: Sports identity card
identity.copy: No cheating here. Your info defines your category.

initiation.heading: How it works
initiation.copy: Read this once. Then go earn your place.
initiation.subheading: This is not a tracker. It’s competition.

1.title: Challenges → score
1.body: Pick a challenge, submit a score (time or reps). Your score appears on the leaderboard.

2.title: Smart Proof (Top 10%)
2.body: Most scores are honor-based. If you hit Top 10%, you must paste a YouTube/TikTok link to validate.

3.title: Your next move
3.body: Choose a faction, then enter the Arena and post your first score.

errors.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 2 characters.

onboarding.comingSoon: This flow is next. For now this page exists to validate auth redirects.
